arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the security group rule.

cidr_ipv4.description: The IPv4 CIDR block that the security group rule applies to.

cidr_ipv6.description: The IPv6 CIDR block that the security group rule applies to.

description.description: A description of the security group rule.

from_port.description: The starting port for the range of ports that the rule applies to.

id.description: The ID of the security group rule.

ip_protocol.description: The protocol used by the security group rule (e.g., TCP, UDP, ICMP).

is_egress.description: Indicates whether the rule is an egress rule (true) or ingress rule (false).

prefix_list_id.description: The ID of the prefix list that the rule applies to, if any.

referenced_security_group_id.description: The ID of the security group that is referenced by this rule, if any.

security_group_id.description: The ID of the security group to which this rule belongs.

security_group_rule_id.description: The unique ID of this specific security group rule.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the security group rule.

to_port.description: The ending port for the range of ports that the rule applies to.
